protein_name: mRNA-binding protein involved in proper cytoplasmic distribution of mitochondria. Specifically binds mRNAs of nuclear-encoded mitochondrial proteins in the cytoplasm and regulates transport or translation of these transcripts close to mitochondria, playing a role in mitochondrial biogenesis. Belongs to the CLU family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: mRNA binding; protein binding; RNA binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: intracellular distribution of mitochondria; mitochondrion organization
